description: As an action, you can touch a creature and restore HP equal to your Proficiency Bonus.
You know the Light cantrip. Charisma is your spellcasting ability for it.
As a Bonus Action, transform for 1 minute. Choose Radiant Soul, Radiant Consumption, or Necrotic Shroud.
Replace one attack with a line or cone of energy. DC = 8 + Con mod + PB.
Bonus Action: gain flying speed equal to Speed for 10 minutes.
Advantage on saving throws to avoid or end the Poisoned condition.
HP max increases by 1 per level.
Bonus Action: gain Truesense 60 ft for 10 minutes. Uses = PB per Long Rest.
Gain proficiency in Insight, Perception, or Survival (your choice).
Advantage on saving throws to avoid or end the Charmed condition.
You do not need sleep and complete a Long Rest in 4 hours.
Advantage on Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma saving throws.
You know Minor Illusion.
You can cast Disguise Self once per Long Rest.
You can cast Invisibility once per Long Rest.
You know Mending.
You can cast Identify once per Long Rest.
You can cast Alarm once per Long Rest.
Count as one size larger for carrying capacity.
Bonus Action: gain Large benefits for 10 minutes.
Bonus Action teleport 30 ft. Uses = PB per Long Rest.
On hit, deal extra fire damage = PB. Uses = PB per Long Rest.
On hit, reduce target Speed by 10 ft.
Reaction to impose Disadvantage on an attack.
Reaction: reduce damage by 1d12 + Con mod.
On hit, deal thunder damage = PB.
Reroll a 1 on a d20 Test.
Advantage on saving throws vs Frightened.
Move through spaces of larger creatures.
Hide when obscured by a larger creature.
Once per Long Rest, add 1d4 to a d20 Test.
Gain proficiency in one skill of your choice.
Gain one Origin feat of your choice.
Bonus Action Dash; gain temp HP = PB. Uses = PB per rest.
When reduced to 0 HP, drop to 1 instead (1/Long Rest).
You know Thaumaturgy.
You know Poison Spray.
Cast Ray of Sickness 1/Long Rest.
Cast Hold Person 1/Long Rest.
You know Chill Touch.
Cast False Life 1/Long Rest.
Cast Ray of Enfeeblement 1/Long Rest.
You know Fire Bolt.
Cast Hellish Rebuke 1/Long Rest.
Cast Darkness 1/Long Rest.
